// HuntSettings: Documentation keys (//) precede each setting block.
// EnableHunt: Master switch for kill tracking, Hunt XP, hunt, and combat hooks.
// BottomTenPopularityMultiplier: Kill credit and kill-XP multiplier for globally least-killed species (bottom 10).
// HuntUseClockSchedule: Fixed UTC hunt slots (default: :00, :20, :40 for 15m each = 3 hunts/hour). Set false for HuntIntervalHours rotation.
// HuntSlotStartMinutes: UTC minute-of-hour each hunt starts (three windows per hour with gaps).
// HuntIntervalHours: Hours between hunt rotations when HuntUseClockSchedule is false.
// HuntGrantLootTableRolls: End-of-hunt loot from SharedLoot LootConfig. Top 3 only: 1st=rare+, 2nd=uncommon+, 3rd=any.
// HuntGrantPlacementCharacterXp: Grant ACE character XP at hunt end = fraction of XP to next level (Loremaster-style basis).
// HuntPlacementXpFractionFirst: 0.99 = 99% of XP to next level for 1st; 0.66 = 66% 2nd; 0.33 = 33% 3rd; 0.20 = 20% rest.
// BaseHuntXpPerKill: Base Hunt XP (1 = one unit before multipliers) before popularity, hunt, streak, and rarity.
// UseMilestoneXpForTiers: Loot tier milestones track Total Hunt XP (linear with multipliers) instead of raw kill count.
// MilestoneXpTier1: Hunt XP thresholds for loot tier +1 / +2 / +3.
// RarityGlobalKillsThreshold: Shard-wide species kills below this get RarityXpMultiplier (helps low-spawn / under-hunted species). 0 = off.
// RarityXpMultiplier: Hunt XP multiplier when species is rare on the shard (stacks with bottom-ten and hunt).
// DamageBonusUsesHuntXp: Damage bonus from TotalHuntXp instead of kill count.
// DamageBonusPerWeightedKill: When DamageBonusUsesHuntXp is false: percent per lifetime kill.
// DamageBonusCapPercent: Maximum outgoing damage bonus percent from the Hunt system.
// DebounceSaveMilliseconds: Minimum delay between global species JSON flush to disk.
// DenylistCreatureTypes: CreatureType IDs excluded from hunt selection / ranking (e.g. Humans for peasants).
